title: <div>- **Community &amp Openness**: Open-source (LGPL), with extensible YAML-bas
content:
- **Community & Openness**: Open-source (LGPL), with extensible YAML-based rules that don't require deep expertise
- **Deterministic Execution**: Produces consistent, reproducible results

### Best Implementation for Any Repository
- Integrate Semgrep into CI/CD pipelines to catch issues early in development
- Create organization-specific rule sets addressing your codebase's unique patterns and risks
- Use pre-commit hooks to enable developer-level scanning before code is committed
- Establish clear policies around which rules are enforced vs. informational
- Document custom rules with context about why they exist and how developers should handle violations
- Regularly review and update rules to match evolving security standards and team learnings

---

## 2. **TensorFlow** – Quality Over Quantity & Collaborative Development

### Original Intention & Purpose
TensorFlow, developed by Google Brain, was created to democratize AI and machine learning by providing an end-to-end platform that's flexible, scalable, and production-ready. It enables everyone—from researchers to enterprises—to build intelligent solutions efficiently[[1]](https://www.tensorflow.org/about).
